commands.summary: PR-015: new authenticated GET /api/diagnostics returns runtime/node_version/platform/schema_version/uptime and redacted booleans; the test asserts 401 without token, 200 with token, and that a set TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN sentinel never appears in the response. 9/9 server tests pass.
PR-010: single-instance lock added before app ready (app.requestSingleInstanceLock(); second-instance focuses the existing window). main.js syntax valid.

commands.command: npx electron-builder -c builder.json --dir; launch ForgeLink.exe twice with PID tracking
commands.summary: PR-010 runtime: first instance (pid 18028) stays alive at 5 processes; a second launch (pid 15264) exits and the total stays 5 — the second launch focuses the first window and never forks a competing backend. A control run confirmed one instance stays alive 15s, so the behavior is the lock, not a crash.

environment.process_note: Closes PR-010 (single-instance) and PR-015 (support diagnostics) with evidence. Per decision 0005, PR-007/008/009/012/016 are waived into work items 015/017 and PR-006/011/013/014 remain genuine baseline work; 011 stays active.
